title: Balboa Heights Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Balboa Heights with a Z-Score of +3.89. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and wind speed is moderate at 12.2 km/h. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates no heating requirements, emphasizing the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
